name: VRB (Vision-Robotics Bridge)
suitability: descriptive-only: outputs contact + trajectory affordances, no language corpus
focus_en: Trains a visual affordance model (contact heatmap plus post-contact wrist trajectory) from human video to drive several robot-learning paradigms.
focus_cn: 从人类视频训练视觉可供性模型（接触热图与接触后腕部轨迹），以驱动多种机器人学习范式。
datapath_en: VRB consumes egocentric human video from Ego4D and EPIC-KITCHENS, detecting hand-object contact frames and tracking the wrist to extract a contact point and a post-contact trajectory. It maps these onto human-agnostic frames (with the human inpainted out) and trains a visual affordance model that predicts a contact heatmap and trajectory directly from an image. The output is a visual affordance, not language, so nothing clusterable is produced.
datapath_cn: VRB 使用 Ego4D 与 EPIC-KITCHENS 的第一人称人类视频，检测手物接触帧并跟踪腕部，提取接触点与接触后轨迹。它将这些信息映射到去除人类的帧（将人类修复抹去），训练一个直接从图像预测接触热图与轨迹的视觉可供性模型。其输出是视觉可供性而非语言，因此不产生可聚类内容。
flow_en: robot learning (imitation / explore / goal-conditioned / action params)
flow_cn: 接触检测 + 腕部跟踪
视觉可供性模型（接触 + 轨迹）
机器人学习（模仿 / 探索 / 目标条件 / 动作参数化）
no_corpus_en: VRB is an affordance-learning method, not an annotation source. It consumes existing egocentric video and releases code (MIT) plus an affordance model that outputs contact heatmaps and wrist trajectories, not text. There are no VRB-original language strings to download or cluster.
no_corpus_cn: VRB 是一种可供性学习方法，而非标注来源。它消费已有的第一人称视频，并以 MIT 许可发布代码与一个输出接触热图和腕部轨迹（而非文本）的可供性模型。没有 VRB 原创的语言字符串可供下载或聚类。
example_caption_en: VRB extracts contact points and post-contact wrist trajectories from Ego4D and EPIC-KITCHENS egocentric video; the project page and demo video show the affordance predictions.
example_caption_cn: VRB 从 Ego4D 与 EPIC-KITCHENS 第一人称视频中提取接触点与接触后腕部轨迹；项目主页与演示视频展示了可供性预测。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2304.08488, vision-robotics-bridge.github.io, and github.com/shikharbahl/vrb (MIT).
citation: Bahl et al., Affordances from Human Videos as a Versatile Representation for Robotics, CVPR 2023 (arXiv:2304.08488).
